        cell = ws_data.cell(row, col)
        if cell.value is None:
            print(f"Empty cell at {cell.coordinate}")

# Check for empty rows
for row in range(2, 202):  # Rows 2-201
    row_data = []
    for col in range(1, 53):  # Columns 1-52
        cell = ws_data.cell(row, col)
        row_data.append(str(cell.value)[:20] if cell.value else "")
    if all(val == "" for val in row_data):
        print(f"Empty row {row}")
